extension.description: Keyboard navigation through the widget tree of a Dart file, designed for screen readers.
command.help: Show the help inside the list
config.separator:
Text inserted between the level and the widget name (`L3 · Padding`).

Change it if your screen reader reads the middle dot in a distracting way: try ` - ` or `, `.
config.excludedClasses: Class names that must NOT be treated as widgets, IN ADDITION to the built-in list (see `widgetParser.ts`). Example: `MyHelper`.
